data.title: 国际服例行维护25（延期）
data.summary: [11/1 Scheduled Maintenance Notice] Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 11/1 (T
data.body:
[11/1 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]
Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 11/1 (Tue).

Maintenance Period: 11/1 (Tue) 2:00 – 8:00 AM (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101763

※Maintenance times may change based on conditions.

[11/1 (Tue) Maintenance Schedule Change Notice]

Maintenance on 11/1 (Tue) has been postponed until next week, in light of the tragic incident that had resulted in the loss of many lives in South Korea last weekend.

➡️Detail: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101793
